description: §48.3.5 — an `async` modifier on a `fn` declaration SHALL fire E-FN-005. `fn` is always synchronous; the `async fn loadProfile(id)` declaration is rejected (the `fn`-scope manifestation of the language-wide §19.9.8 no-async rule, S114). Reject-path (pos) half of the E-FN-005 pin; the clean neg is `fn/sync-decl-clean` (the same body as a plain sync `fn` — silent). (The whole-program `async`-in-scrml gate also fires E-ASYNC-NOT-IN-SCRML here; the codes assertion is a superset, so the incidental sibling code is not asserted.)
rationale: §48.3.5: `fn` is always synchronous — an `async` declaration (or an `await` in the body) is E-FN-005. Perform the `await` at the call site and pass the resolved value as a parameter to `fn`.
